name: Husnain Asif
message:
Dear Hiring Manager,
As a dedicated Front-End Developer with 1+ years of experience specializing in modern JavaScript frameworks, I am excited to apply for your Front-End Developer role. Your focus on building state-of-the-art applications using Angular 17+ perfectly aligns with my technical expertise and recent project experience.
Throughout my career, I have successfully developed, modified, and optimized web applications while collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to resolve errors and maintain high code quality. I have practical experience implementing unit and integration tests, participating in rigorous code reviews, and building UI components using the PrimeNG library. Having worked extensively with GitLab, automated CI/CD workflows, and Figma, I am fully equipped to integrate smoothly into your Agile/Scrum development process. I am highly motivated to bring my skills in responsive design and WCAG accessibility standards to your dynamic team."
preferred_contract_type: My preferred form of employment is a full-time, direct employment contract (Umowa o pracę). However, I am open to discussing the most suitable contract type that aligns with the visa sponsorship and work permit process.
